requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 as International Baseline for Cambodia BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62933作为柬埔寨BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62933作為柬埔寨BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Cambodia's Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — the national standards body — adopts IEC standards as the basis for Cambodian standards (CS series). ISC does not operate a pre-market product certification mandatory scheme for BESS equivalent to CE marking or SABER as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and the Electricity Authority of Cambodia (EAC) and EDC, project owners, and international financiers operating in Cambodia are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite for BESS procurement and installation approval. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries) may apply to portable battery components. IEC 62619 conformity evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the expected market-entry baseline for Cambodia BESS projects. Chinese CQC/CCC marks are not recognised by ISC or EAC as equivalent to IEC 62619 conformity.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨国家标准机构柬埔寨标准研究所（ISC）以IEC标准为基础采纳柬埔寨标准（CS系列）。截至本数据集日期，ISC尚未为BESS建立与CE标志或SABER等效的强制性上市前产品认证制度。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，在柬埔寨运营的柬埔寨电力管理局（EAC）、EDC、项目业主和国际融资方，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为BESS采购和安装批准的技术前提。IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）可能适用于便携式电池组件。来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619合规证据是柬埔寨BESS项目的预期市场准入基准。中国CQC/CCC标志不被ISC或EAC认可为IEC 62619合规的等效依据。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨國家標準機構柬埔寨標準研究所（ISC）以IEC標準為基礎採納柬埔寨標準（CS系列）。截至本數據集日期，ISC尚未為BESS建立與CE標誌或SABER等效的強制性上市前產品認證制度。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，在柬埔寨運營的柬埔寨電力管理局（EAC）、EDC、項目業主和國際融資方，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為BESS採購和安裝批准的技術前提。IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）可能適用於便攜式電池組件。來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619合規證據是柬埔寨BESS項目的預期市場准入基準。中國CQC/CCC標誌不被ISC或EAC認可為IEC 62619合規的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Cambodia project specifications)
IEC 62133-2:2017 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (may apply to portable battery components)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems for grid integration (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) — national standards body, adopts IEC standards; isc.gov.kh
EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) — electricity regulator and licensor; expected to apply IEC-based technical prerequisites for BESS projects; eac.gov.kh

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. Chinese CQC and CCC marks are domestic Chinese certification marks and are not recognised by ISC or EAC as equivalent to IEC 62619 conformity. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, as Chinese standards are not accepted as substitutes in Cambodia project specifications or EAC/EDC technical requirements.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。中国CQC和CCC标志是中国国内认证标志，不被ISC或EAC认可为IEC 62619合规的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据，因为中国标准不被柬埔寨项目规格或EAC/EDC技术要求接受为替代依据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。中國CQC和CCC標誌是中國國內認證標誌，不被ISC或EAC認可為IEC 62619合規的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據，因為中國標準不被柬埔寨項目規格或EAC/EDC技術要求接受為替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Cambodia project owners, EAC, and international financiers operating in Cambodia reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Cambodia project technical specifications. Chinese CQC/CCC marks carry no recognition under ISC or EAC frameworks. Exporters should: (a) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Cambodia BESS projects; (b) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or EAC/EDC technical requirements before committing to a test programme; (c) verify with ISC (isc.gov.kh) whether any Cambodian Standard (CS) specifically for BESS cells or systems has been adopted that may impose additional conformity obligations; (d) note that Cambodia is an emerging BESS market and regulatory requirements may evolve — direct verification with ISC and EAC before each project is strongly recommended.
gap.zh: 关键差距：在柬埔寨运营的项目业主、EAC及国际融资方将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被柬埔寨项目技术规格接受为替代依据。中国CQC/CCC标志在ISC或EAC框架下不具认可效力。出口商应：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至柬埔寨BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（b）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或EAC/EDC技术要求中引用的IEC 62619版本；（c）向ISC（isc.gov.kh）核实是否有专门针对BESS电芯或系统的柬埔寨标准（CS）已被采纳，这可能会带来额外的合格评定义务；（d）注意柬埔寨是新兴BESS市场，监管要求可能持续演变——强烈建议在每个项目前直接向ISC和EAC核实。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：在柬埔寨運營的項目業主、EAC及國際融資方將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被柬埔寨項目技術規格接受為替代依據。中國CQC/CCC標誌在ISC或EAC框架下不具認可效力。出口商應：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至柬埔寨BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（b）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或EAC/EDC技術要求中引用的IEC 62619版本；（c）向ISC（isc.gov.kh）核實是否有專門針對BESS電芯或系統的柬埔寨標準（CS）已被採納，這可能會帶來額外的合格評定義務；（d）注意柬埔寨是新興BESS市場，監管要求可能持續演變——強烈建議在每個項目前直接向ISC和EAC核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where EAC, EDC, or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; no confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation from ISC as of dataset date — verify directly with ISC (isc.gov.kh) and EAC (eac.gov.kh)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; CQC/CCC marks are domestic only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Cambodia as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Cambodia project specifications and EAC/EDC technical requirements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Cambodia project acceptance. Chinese CQC/CCC marks carry no recognition under ISC or EAC frameworks. Verify ISC current CS standards scope, confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner and EAC/EDC, and obtain type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，柬埔寨尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是柬埔寨项目规格和EAC/EDC技术要求中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足柬埔寨项目验收要求。中国CQC/CCC标志在ISC或EAC框架下不具认可效力。出货前请核实ISC现行CS标准范围，向项目业主及EAC/EDC确认IEC 62619证据要求，并从ILAC认可实验室取得型式试验证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，柬埔寨尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是柬埔寨項目規格和EAC/EDC技術要求中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足柬埔寨項目驗收要求。中國CQC/CCC標誌在ISC或EAC框架下不具認可效力。出貨前請核實ISC現行CS標準範圍，向項目業主及EAC/EDC確認IEC 62619證據要求，並從ILAC認可實驗室取得型式試驗證書。
